title: Tagge (disambiguation)
content:
'''Tagge''' might refer to:

*'''[[Cassio Tagge/Legends|Cassio Tagge]]''', a commander on the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]
*'''[[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]]''', a family which owned the [[House of Tagge/Legends|House of Tagge]] holding company and the [[Tagge Company/Legends|TaggeCo]] corporation, and whose membership included at least [[General Tagge|two generals]]
*'''[[Orman Tagge/Legends|Orman Tagge]]'''
*'[[Tagge Company/Legends|''Tagge Company''']], owned by House of Tagge
*'''[[Ulric Tagge/Legends|Ulric Tagge]]''', Imperial General and younger brother of Orman Tagge

{{Disambig}}
